selectedTopic.title: AI Traffic Is Forcing Cache Design to Change
selectedTopic.sourceTopic: Why we're rethinking cache for the AI era
selectedTopic.topicAngle: AI bot traffic is turning CDN cache strategy into a product, platform, and cost architecture decision

whySelected: This topic has the strongest mix of current relevance, broad technical audience appeal, and search intent. It connects AI, platform cost, web performance, documentation strategy, and infra design in a way that is useful to engineers, founders, and dev-tool buyers without sounding like another generic agent hype post.

duplicationCheck.duplicateCheckerTitle: AI Traffic Is Forcing Cache Design to Change
duplicationCheck.reason: Distinct from existing log entries, which mostly center on AI coding agents, code review, security funding, Docker Offload, and the Trivy supply-chain incident rather than CDN cache behavior under AI traffic.
